title: The Spire
description:
Its roots no longer able to draw nourishment from [orange]Preon[/orange], the [gold]Ancient Trees[/gold] began to wither and die... the once beautiful forests surrender to the weight of eternity.

Even Neow’s Tree loses its branches and lush foliage. The last tree is no tree at all.
They give it a name.

title: The Ironclad
description:
[red]The Ironclad.[/red] A warrior from a faraway land entered the [gold]Spire[/gold].
Driven by pure instinct and accursed blood, he has lost all reason and identity.

All who prevent his ascent shall perish.

title: Buy Something!
description:
Currency was invented!
Desperate times call for desperate measures... and desperate measures cost [gold]Gold[/gold]! Spend that [gold]Gold[/gold] to acquire a morsel of food, the sharpest of daggers, or a fashionable hat!! Buy something! Approach any [blue]blue-clothed merchant[/blue] on a [green]green rug[/green], and you'll be treated to a fantastic shopping experience. We don't turn away anybody!

(Disclaimer: This Epoch description was paid for by Merchant)

title: Trophies
description: Fantastic trophies occupy this forsaken place. All were defeated, one by one. Those marked by the Silent always fall.

title: Poisoner
description:
Another hunt concludes.

Stilling the putrid Heart with a [sine]special-made poison[/sine], the [green]Silent[/green] rappels upwards and outwards and longs to bathe in the comforting moonlight. She leaves the [gold]Spire[/gold] with a prize in hand. A piece of the [purple]Heart[/purple].

title: Laser Beams
description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] punctured the [purple]Heart[/purple] with a magnificently charged [jitter]BEEEAAAAM!![/jitter]

Mission accomplished...?
Damage Sustained: [red]<CRITICAL>[/red]

Next Objective:
Relocate to [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] for evaluation.

title: Ablaze
description:
The [red]Ironclad[/red] slays the [purple]Heart[/purple] with its full might... and the Demon's Contract hungrily absorbs the [purple]Blight[/purple] unto itself.

Immediately, the warrior and [purple]Blight[/purple] are set ablaze. The parasite is drawn into the flame, its writhing form consumed like wax wicking into a fire.

title: Preon
description:
A [sine]void of nothingness[/sine].

But then, the world came into existence!
It churned about and molded itself to “That which tells stories.” Along this journey lay a planet named [green]Preon[/green], a mere speck in this universe. They say that a great story about a [gold]Spire[/gold] took place there.

title: The Architect
description:
Too many [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to populate [orange]Preon[/orange] and things aren’t simple and fun anymore. The creatures didn’t make sense. The monsters don’t follow logic.
[sine]Maybe[/sine] there needs to be one which can create, destroy, and control this mess? An entity with its own imagination and will?

Let’s [sine]Imagine[/sine] such a being.

title: Traitors
description:
One of the many Ancients, [blue]Neow[/blue], grew jealous of the awe-inspiring will of the [red]Architect[/red].

She confided with a like-minded sibling and together they created a most potent concoction.
[purple]The Blight[/purple].

title: Seeds
description:
Enamored by the growth and stability of flora and fauna, the [red]Architect[/red] spends decades researching and refining them... And so, at last, the penultimate creation— [gold]“The Ancient Seeds”[/gold] are complete!

The seeds which turned out to be failures, [purple]“The Mistakes”[/purple], were placed in a heavy coffer and hurled into the ocean’s depths.

title: The Daily
description: A being of immense power exercises his mastery of form and space once a day, shifting the very nature of the [gold]Spire[/gold].

title: Resolving Bugs
description:
[blue]Defect[/blue] and [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fast became friends and exited the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange]; it was sad there.

They return to the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] mid floors and are met with a [jitter]MASSIVE BUG INFESTATION[/jitter]!!
The pair get to work in an attempt to reduce the bugs to a reasonable level.

title: Cultists
description:
[jitter]“Caw... Caw caw!!”[/jitter]
Such a humiliating defeat... their places of worship and sacrifices desecrated over and over by ruinous invaders.

Has [blue]Mazaleth[/blue] forsaken us?

Food within the [gold]Spire[/gold] has become scarce as the bug population surges. The [blue]Flock[/blue] escape to the lower rungs of the [gold]Spire[/gold] and scrape by on [green][sine]seaweed[/sine][/green] and [purple][jitter]sewer critters[/jitter][/purple].

title: Devastation
description:
[jitter]The [red]Ironclad’s[/red] strength surges![/jitter]

The flames of the Demonic pact course through his blood. Cuts and bruises heal rapidly. The [blue]Valleyguard[/blue] are cleaved in two, the [orange]Desert Tribe[/orange] are burned to a crisp, [green]Wind Walkers[/green] [jitter]smashed[/jitter] into the ground, and even a familiar horde of aggressive bronze-cladded warriors are set ablaze with these [sine]exciting new flames[/sine]!

All of the Ironclad’s enemies are shown no mercy. All of the Ironclads... Ironclad?
...where is everyone?

title: Life and Death
description:
A [pink]young explorer[/pink] unlatched the [purple]Forbidden Grimoire[/purple]... Magics from another time and place explode outward as weightless dark smoke overwhelms this curious one.

She gains the [sine][purple]Understandings of Life and Death[/purple][/sine] — but at a cost. Her skin, hair, and organs rapidly rot away as her soul is forcefully bound into the locket in her pocket.

The Grimoire whispers, [sine][red]“If I die, you die.”[/red][/sine]

title: Annihilation
description:
At the top, they finally met with the [green]Giant’s[/green] brother, a [sine][red]floating man[/red][/sine]. They plead for aid but to no avail.
“Interlopers aren’t welcome.”

Only a [pink]little girl[/pink] made it out alive.

title: Open
description:
The clouds churn maliciously as [blue]The Capital[/blue] trembles beneath a storm so violent that none dare to leave their homes.

Twelve days later, the rain stops.
The clouds remain, but the [purple]Flame[/purple] has gone out.

The [gold]Spire[/gold] opens its doors once more.

title: The Calm
description:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] stopped consuming.

The ground, dry and brittle- begins to moisten. The clouds around the [gold]Spire[/gold] douse the lands. The sunlight pierces through newly formed cracks in the clouds.

It has been done. Someone had slain the Spire.

title: I Arrive
description:
[jitter]*KABOOOOM*[/jitter]

A fantastic explosion marks the arrival of the [orange]Regent[/orange]. His Majesty's spaceship shattered beyond repair.

“Finally, I arrive!”

title: We Need a Hero!
description:
Deadly monsters had begun to trickle out of the [gold]Spire[/gold] at an increasing pace ever since the Doors have reopened...

Brave warriors, explorers, and mercenaries have been sent in but few make progress.
Even fewer make it back alive.

The [orange]Regent[/orange] learns of this dismay and takes it upon himself to become the hero that Preon needs!
“I enter!!”

title: Grand Strategy
description:
“Defeat!? Me!!? The [gold]Regent of Starris[/gold], does not know defeat! The [red]strange man[/red] at the top of this tower must be defeated by me and only me!”

[orange]The Regent[/orange] devises a [blue]royally brilliant plan[/blue] to become stronger. To immortalize this, it is etched into a nearby stone.

[b]T R Y     H A R D E R[/b]

title: Scribbles
description:
On this quiet planet, [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to dot the world.

They roam the lands in this time of simple, gleeful violence. Countless ways to kill, to feed, and proliferate are [sine]suggested[/sine]. Colonies, hives, groups, and schools ebb and flow into the nooks and crannies of [orange]Preon[/orange].

title: Consequences
description:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] takes hold of the comatose [red]Architect[/red] and its poison amplifies! It forms a symbiotic relationship with Neow’s Tree and it [sine]hungered[/sine] to grow and grow.

The other Ancients capture the culprit as the [purple]Blight[/purple] ravages the land. They imprison [blue]Neow[/blue] and take shelter from the now unstoppable [purple]Blight[/purple].

title: Ill
description:
A sickness carrying a [sine]familiar scent[/sine] courses through the [green]Silent’s[/green] veins, the [purple]Heart piece[/purple] is slowly killing her!
The [purple]grotesque trophy[/purple] is hurled into the ocean, but the blight has no cure.

She will die soon.

title: Somewhere
description: This is a placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...

title: Elsewhere
description: This is another placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...

title: Darv
description:
“Spire’s reopened eh? More treasures for my collection!”

Darv smelled riches in the air and entered the Spire on his trusty steed.

title: Tricked
description:
[blue]Neow[/blue] resurrected the defective construct, no simple feat even for an Ancient.

[sine]“Construct... what you.. ..lost....
Your [red]creator[/red]... ..abandoned you.. ...hides..... at the... ..top...”[/sine]
The [blue]Defect[/blue] thanks [blue]Neow[/blue] and heads for the top, seeking answers.

title: Ooh Shiny!
description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] entered a disorderly chamber filled with [gold]treasures[/gold], [green]trinkets[/green], [red]weapons[/red], [blue]exotic animals[/blue], [orange]art pieces[/orange], [purple]books[/purple], and all manner of [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]junk and doodads[/rainbow][/sine].

The amount of disorder and information is overwhelming for the poor [blue]Defect’s[/blue] processing core.

[jitter]“Outta tha way!”[/jitter] Shouts a megafaunal humanoid riding a threat-level: 9 reptile, but then stops in its tracks and turns to the [blue]Defect[/blue] with a [sine]strange grin[/sine].

“I've got somethin' for ya!”

title: They Return
description:
The Ancients emerged from hiding and head to the [gold]Spire[/gold]...

It has been too long since they had received its blessings.

title: The Pact
description: For centuries, war raged between the [red]Ironclads[/red] and the [blue]Valleyguard[/blue]. Driven by ambition, a young ironclad ventures to the forbidden boundary and bargains with the sacred [jitter]“Demon”[/jitter].

title: Snuffed
description:
It is said that a never ceasing flame atop the [gold]Spire[/gold] burns proudly. Proven by the neighboring clouds glowing a gentle violet through the darkest winter nights.

Then one day, the clouds were normal.
The [purple]flame[/purple] went out.

title: The Giant
description:
Today marks a fantastic discovery!

A benevolent giant has agreed to guide us to the top of the Spire to meet his brother.
We believe this brother of his has the solution to stop the monsters which have been pouring out of the Spire.

This would be the greatest accomplishment of our time!

title: To Kill
description:
The [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] faced off against the [red]Architect[/red] and demands the restoration of the [green]Giant[/green], her parents, her humanity. She’s [jitter]blazing with vengeance[/jitter] but is annihilated again and again.

On one of her ascents, she discovers a massive dragon, [gold]Pael[/gold]. Giving off the same gentle presence as the [green]Giant[/green], he speaks...

[thinky_dots]“This will help you get his attention...”[/thinky_dots]

title: Neow
description:
Mother of resurrection, [blue]Neow[/blue], awakened from her slumber.

[sine]“Rise.. champion..... again. Again...”[/sine]

title: Anomalous Planet
description:
His Majesty barely even looked anymore and swiped through planet profiles in the current constellation. “I DEMAND to visit a more exciting planet!”
[orange]The Regent[/orange] slammed his fists down on the space console—
[jitter][red]*BEEP BEEP BEEP*[/red][/jitter]
[jitter]Anomalous Planet Detected![/jitter]

title: Little King
description:
“LITTLE KING. YOU BRIM WITH MIGHTINESS LIKE I!”
[gold]Tanx[/gold] is immediately taken with [orange]the Regent’s[/orange] regal confidence.

“DOMINATE THE SPIRE! CRUSH THEM ALL!!” he bellows, hurling a [sine]strange sceptre[/sine] toward him.

“THIS WILL LET YOU FIGHT ON EVEN GROUND!”

title: Ancients
description:
The [green]Ancient Trees[/green] are not all the same. Each individual tree is shaped by its surroundings. Some are stout and bushy while others are gnarled and knotted.

When fully mature, a manifestation of its immense power is born within.

An [gold]Ancient[/gold].

title: Arise
description:
The [red]Architect[/red] wakes up from the longest of slumbers; the sleep was poor.

Memories return in fragments and his surroundings are alien.
He is not who he once was.

title: Bigger Prey
description:
The other sisters judge the fourth one in silence...
 They have not seen her for over [blue]three centuries[/blue] and she returns with an [jitter][purple]ugly[/purple][/jitter] [sine][blue]pulsating[/blue][/sine] [red]scrap[/red].

[green]The Silent[/green] recollects the trials she endured for this trophy but does not speak; to speak is weak. One can only prove herself with more impressive trophies.

There is always bigger prey.

title: Nemesis
description:
Ghastly nightmares of [sine][purple]tormented souls[/purple][/sine] stalk the [green]Foglands[/green].

She takes it upon herself to hunt the haunter. Once the hunt is complete, its skull is ceremoniously placed upon her by her [green]Sisters[/green]. The ritual has concluded.

title: Slumber
description:
Neow excitedly presented the [red]Architect[/red] with a potent [purple]tea[/purple] she had been working on since his prior visit.

[sine]“This... will help... ..you sleep.....”[/sine]

title: Booting Up
description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] reboots!
Surrounded by a wreckage of [orange]molten metal[/orange], [sine][red]ash[/red][/sine], and [jitter][green]thousands of dead bugs[/green][/jitter]!?
DATA LOG: [red]<CORRUPT>[/red].

Its core barely held together, limbs barely responsive, the [blue]Defect[/blue] scavenges broken panels and pieces from other constructs to patch itself together.

title: My Face
description:
“The [gold]Spire[/gold] was mine to rule. But the Architect lives again. [jitter]Look what he's done to my FACE[/jitter].”

The Demon throws a massive fit, smashing his chamber and setting all manner of things on fire.

“My death puppet, brandish my power and kill again. [jitter]KILL THE ARCHITECT!![/jitter]”

title: The Twelve
description:
Who is worthy to enter the exalted Spire?
[blue]The Capital[/blue] gathers the most [purple]brilliant[/purple], [green]formidable[/green], and [red]courageous[/red] from all the lands.
Twelve explorers formed an expedition and advanced inside to make history.

None made it back.

title: Spireborn
description:
“We were but meant to survey the preliminary floors...
But it proved nothing like we expected! Such wondrous [green]wildlife[/green], [gold]curious artifacts[/gold], and even [blue]wandering traders[/blue]. From whence have these marvels arrived?

Our team seems intent on hoarding riches but at least my enthusiasm is shared by [orange]Geovan[/orange]. We have fallen [sine][red]madly in love[/red][/sine], and soon shall welcome a [pink]child[/pink] into our lives.”

title: Orobas
description:
Attracted by the now burning Spire, Orobas’ curiosity was piqued.

“Blight gone!! Why gone! Safe to enter!? Orobas enters!!!”

title: Friends
description:
His Majesty attempted to make friends. Literally.

They're quite sturdy and decent at following instructions. They're terrible at chess and enjoy pop music. The minions were swiftly demoted from “Friend” to “Minion”.
[sine]Sigh...[/sine]

title: Discontent
description:
On his home planet, the Regent proclaims to be the heir to the Sun and decides that all the other planets must know!

“Why do you wish for this, Regent? We have everything we need! We needn't eat, we have peace, we cannot die, and we are fashionable!” a fellow [orange]Starrian[/orange] pleads.

[jitter]“You are BORING!”[/jitter]

title: Hello! Hello!
description:
In the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] the [blue]Defect[/blue] pondered its fate and purpose.

[sine]Is being okay at a host of functions not desirable? Do we all need to excel at a distinct function?[/sine] While processing these questions—

“Hello!” pops out another construct.
“Hello!” [blue]Defect[/blue] responds.
“My name is [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]!”

title: Confrontation
description:
They confronted the source of the worst bugs:
[sine][purple]A toxic wasp colony residing in triangular nests.[/purple][/sine]

[jitter][blue]PYEEEEWWWW!![/blue][/jitter]

The [blue]Defect[/blue] empties its energy reserves and tears the hexapolis wide open!
The [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fires a salvo of laser pulses to keep the [red][jitter]cloud of stinging retaliation[/jitter][/red] at bay!

It's not enough.

title: Futility
description:
[b][gold]Incident Report[/gold][/b] // [blue]Date: 2,771-??-??[/blue]
Accidentally entered a conflict between a boulder-throwing individual and flying automatons.

[b]Jacktopher Grootz (Fighter):[/b] Crushed by a boulder
[b]Jose Paxo (Fighter):[/b] Fell in a hole
[b]Big Ed (Bard):[/b] Shot by a construct
[b]Garbo Doughbee (Healer):[/b] Touched grass
[b]Temi Mondes (Arcanist):[/b] Whereabouts unknown

title: Fog Rolls In
description:
News of the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] reopening made its way to the [green]Silent[/green].
She ferries a boat to [blue]The Capital[/blue].

title: Soup
description:
[sine]“Hello, little one...!”[/sine] the massive [orange]Tezcatara[/orange] whispered to the [green]Silent[/green].

“Grow big and strong!” The Ancient speaks in a tender tone and scoots over a bowl of nutritious [sine]soup[/sine].

title: Civilization
description:
Societies and cultures from around the world make a pilgrimage to the Spire as it becomes the trading hub of the world.

Slowly, a burgeoning metropolis began to form at its base.

title: Underdocks
description:
Once a source of [blue]clean water[/blue] for all the [gold]Spire[/gold], the [gold]Underdocks[/gold] falls into disrepair.
[red][jitter]Aggressive sea creatures[/jitter][/red] emerged from its depths, making a home in the maze-like passages.
